properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Right now you're filled with sorrow the latter sting of pain And the tears of brokenness are falling again They may be tears of betrayal They may be tears of remorse your heart needs a healing And Jesus is the source

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His healing Love breaks the yoke of sin His healing Love makes us clean again What every heart's in need of He can provide with just one touch Oh, we need a touch of healing Love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He reaches with compassion to those bowed down with pain His heart is pierced as was His side The day He bore our shame He has known betrayal from men with no remorse But a heart filled with humility He willingly restores

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Send down your touch Send down your touch of healing Love Send down your touch We need your touch of healing Love
